tagline: Seamless aluminum gutters, downspouts, and gutter guards.
metaDescription: Seamless aluminum gutter replacement in Los Angeles County. K-style, half-round, downspouts, and gutter guards. Free inspections. CA Lic. #1109337.
intro_h2: Seamless Gutter Replacement in LA County
intro: Gutters protect your siding, windows, foundation, and landscaping from roof runoff. When they're undersized, clogged, or leaking, water finds its way where it shouldn't. Palm Crest Roofing installs seamless aluminum gutters — formed on-site to the exact length of your roof line — along with downspouts and gutter guards.
benefits: Seamless aluminum gutters in 5" and 6" K-style
20+ color options to match your trim or fascia
Properly sized downspouts and downspout extensions
Leaf Relief, Gutter Helmet, and micro-mesh gutter guards

process.title: Measure & Inspect
process.desc: Measure roof line, identify downspout locations, check existing fascia for rot or damage.

process.title: Fascia Repair
process.desc: If the fascia board is damaged, we replace it before hanging gutters — critical for secure mounting.

process.title: On-Site Forming
process.desc: Seamless aluminum is formed to exact length on-site from coil stock — no field seams.

process.title: Hanging & Sloping
process.desc: Gutters hung with hidden hangers at proper slope (1/4" per 10 feet) toward downspouts.

process.title: Downspouts & Extensions
process.desc: Downspouts mounted, sealed, and extended away from foundation.

faqs.a: Traditional sectional gutters have a seam every 10 feet — and seams eventually leak. Seamless gutters are formed on-site to the exact length of your roof line with only end caps, corner miters, and downspout outlets as seams.
If you have trees overhanging your roof, yes — they drastically reduce maintenance and prevent clogs. We install Leaf Relief, micro-mesh, and other quality guard systems.

faqs.q: How much do seamless gutters cost?
faqs.a: Typical residential installs run $8–$14 per linear foot for 5" K-style, $10–$18/ft for 6", and $15–$25/ft for half-round copper or specialty profiles. Final pricing depends on height, access, and downspout count.
